name: CANNABIS SUISSE CORP.
business: The company engages in real estate operations by subleasing a portion of a building. It subleased a commercial building from a company controlled by its CEO and subleased to a third party. The sublease was terminated on February 28, 2025, and the company currently has limited operations.

exposures.sentence: Since June 2022, the Company has focused its efforts on real estate operations.
